evals.prompt: what are my open todos for genbook?
evals.expected_output: Grouped summary of open todos from genbook*.md files using zk_cli.py summary --filter genbook

evals.prompt: add a todo to genbook-api to review the new auth middleware
evals.expected_output: Uses zk_cli.py add genbook-api 'Review the new auth middleware' and confirms the todo was added

evals.prompt: show me notes I created this week
evals.expected_output: Uses zk list --sort created- --created-after 'last week' to show recent notes
